data_description.humidity_threshold: Minimum indoor relative humidity before ventilation is allowed. Typical for garages: 50-55%. Lower values trigger ventilation more often.
data_description.ah_diff_threshold: Absolute Humidity (AH) = actual amount of water in the air (g/m³), independent of temperature. This threshold defines how much more moisture (in g/m³) the indoor air must have compared to outdoor air before ventilation is triggered. Higher value = less frequent but more effective. Recommended: 3-5 g/m³.
data_description.ventilation_open_s: Duration the motor runs when opening to ventilation position. 1.5s ≈ approx. 7-10 cm gap (depends on door speed).
data_description.ventilation_check_interval: How often humidity values are checked and the ventilation recommendation is recalculated.
data_description.presence_entity: Group, person, or sensor for presence detection. Automatic ventilation only opens the door when at least one person is home. If no entity is selected, presence is not checked and ventilation runs anytime.
data_description.rain_close_delay_min: Waiting time in minutes before the door is automatically closed when rain is detected. Prevents a just-opened door from closing immediately. Set to 0 for immediate closing. Recommended: 2-5 minutes.
data_description.rain_sensor: Binary sensor that detects rain (ON = raining). If no sensor is selected, rain auto-close is disabled.
data_description.indoor_temp_sensor: Temperature sensor inside the garage. Used together with the humidity sensor to calculate absolute humidity.
data_description.outdoor_temp_sensor: Temperature sensor outdoors. Used together with the humidity sensor to calculate absolute humidity.
